# Repair tracking across pending change lifecycle: under-replicated range
# needs repair, pending changes suppress it, rejection restores it, and
# enactment via store-leaseholder-msg resolves it.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

# Under-replicated: needs AddVoter.
repair-needed
----
AddVoter: r1

# Pending change suppresses repair.
make-pending-changes range-id=1
  add-replica: add-store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
----
pending(1)
change-id=1 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)

repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Reject the pending change: AddVoter re-emerges.
reject-pending-changes change-ids=1
----
pending(0)

repair-needed
----
AddVoter: r1

# Create the pending change again.
make-pending-changes range-id=1
  add-replica: add-store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
----
pending(1)
change-id=2 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)

repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Enact the change via store-leaseholder-msg showing 3 voters.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
